name: IdsEdwMbrClnclInIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH source_data AS ( SELECT MCI.MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK, COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, MCI.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MCI.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, MCI.CLNCL_IN_ID, MCI.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MCI.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MCI.CLNCL_IN_SK, MCI.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, MCI.MIN_DT_SK, MCI.MAX_DT_SK, MCI.OCCUR_CT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_CLNCL_IN MCI LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON MCI.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CM.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MCI.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle}), transform_data AS ( SELECT MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK, CASE WHEN SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD)='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, CLNCL_IN_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLNCL_IN_SK, MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, MIN_DT_SK AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MIN_DT_SK, MAX_DT_SK AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MAX_DT_SK, OCCUR_CT AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_OCCUR_CT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM source_data WHERE MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK<>0 AND MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK<>1 ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 0 AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_IN_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CLNCL_IN_SK, 0 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MIN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MAX_DT_SK, 0 AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_OCCUR_CT, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) rowunk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 1 AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 1 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'NA' AS CLNCL_IN_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CLNCL_IN_SK, 1 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MIN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_MAX_DT_SK, 0 AS MBR_CLNCL_IN_OCCUR_CT, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) rowna UNION ALL SELECT MBR_CLNCL_IN_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, CLNCL_IN_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLNCL_IN_SK, MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, MBR_CLNCL_IN_MIN_DT_SK, MBR_CLNCL_IN_MAX_DT_SK, MBR_CLNCL_IN_OCCUR_CT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM transform_data ) final

Add Defaults and Null Handling.
